name: @prune/context-health
description: F6 — Context Health. Computes Effective Context Fullness (ECF) per turn from real telemetry usage fields, runs streaming CUSUM change-point detection over the ECF curve, and emits advisory-only inflection warnings (warning at 50%, critical at 75% — pinned to Chroma 2026 context-rot findings). Pure math + AST-typed inputs; no regex, no model call, no fabricated tokens.
